purpose: Target the current Board A next action: unsupported intraday/full-species MainRegimeV2 source-label cells and direct Manipulation matched-negative rows, without repeating broad negative sweeps.

scope.internet_probe_type: targeted source-readback from current gap audit rows, not a broad source lottery

candidate_sources.name: Kaggle Stock Market Regimes 2000-2026
candidate_sources.observed_claim: Labeled daily Bull, Bear, Sideways, Crisis, and High-Volatility regimes with macro context.
candidate_sources.blocker: Does not add unsupported native intraday/full-species cells beyond the already accepted stock/index daily and same-source 1w/1mo gates.

candidate_sources.name: MarketIndicator.io RegimeScore
candidate_sources.observed_claim: Daily post-close model output combining risk-on momentum, breadth, and correlation/liquidity stress signals.
candidate_sources.blocker: Daily model score, not an exportable provider/instrument/timeframe panel with exact Bull/Bear/Sideways/Crisis source labels.

candidate_sources.name: FINRA Potential Manipulation Report
candidate_sources.observed_claim: Monthly firm report includes Layering Detail Data and Spoofing Detail Data fields such as trade date, symbol, timestamps, PBBO prices, side, order count, quantity, market center, and activity description.
candidate_sources.blocker: The public page exposes schema/field definitions, not exportable row-level positive and matched negative controls.

candidate_sources.name: lobflow
candidate_sources.observed_claim: Open-source L2 order-book metrics and manipulation detectors for spoofing, layering, and quote stuffing, including synthetic data generation.
candidate_sources.blocker: Detector confidence and synthetic injected rows cannot replace timestamped real positive/negative order-lifecycle labels.

candidate_sources.name: ETF trend versus oscillation paper
candidate_sources.observed_claim: Binary next-day ETF classification distinguishing trending days from oscillating days.
candidate_sources.blocker: Not an exportable four-root Bull/Bear/Sideways/Crisis panel and not native intraday/full-species coverage.

targeted_positive_path.price_root_lane: No new public attachable native intraday/full-species source-label panel was accepted in this targeted probe. Continue with authenticated/user-provided source-label exports or explicit owner-approved crosswalks only.
targeted_positive_path.direct_manipulation_lane: FINRA Potential Manipulation Report is the most useful concrete schema target for spoofing/layering matched-negative acquisition, but the public page does not provide rows.

next_action: Acquire authenticated or user-provided row exports matching the FINRA spoofing/layering schema, or an exact native intraday/full-species MainRegimeV2 label panel; keep proxy/model/synthetic sources rejected.
